entities.name: PLANT BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The application of scientific tools to modify plants for agricultural improvement

entities.name: PLANT GENETICS
entities.description: The study of heredity and variation in plants

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism

entities.name: MOLECULAR BIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of biological activity at the molecular level

entities.name: AGRICULTURE IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing agricultural productivity and sustainability

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The capacity of a crop to produce a large amount of agricultural produce

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The quality of being nutritious or providing essential nutrients

entities.name: INPUT-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability of a crop to utilize resources like water and fertilizer effectively

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMARTNESS
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand and adapt to climate change

entities.name: CROP VARIETIES
entities.description: Different types of cultivated plants developed for specific traits

entities.name: STRUCTURAL GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the 3D structure of proteins encoded by a genome

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of how genes and proteins work together to produce a phenotype

entities.name: TRAIT DISCOVERY
entities.description: The process of identifying specific characteristics of interest in a plant

entities.name: GENE DISCOVERY
entities.description: The process of identifying genes associated with specific traits

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of RNA transcripts produced by the genome

entities.name: PROTEOMICS
entities.description: The large-scale study of proteins

entities.name: METABOLOMICS
entities.description: The study of small molecule metabolites

entities.name: EPIGENOMICS
entities.description: The study of chemical modifications to DNA and histone proteins

entities.name: NANOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The manipulation of matter on an atomic, molecular, and supramolecular scale

entities.name: ANALYTICAL AND DECISION SUPPORT TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used to analyze data and support decision-making in breeding

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics
